pattern.name: signal_creation
pattern.description: Creating reactive signals for state management

usage_notes.note: Prefer specific typed signals over interface{} for better performance
Keep signals focused on single concerns for better reactivity granularity

pattern.name: effect_creation
pattern.description: Creating effects that respond to signal changes

usage_notes.note: Effects should be pure and deterministic when possible
Use context for cancellation in long-running effects

pattern.name: memo_creation

usage_notes.note: Memos cache results until dependencies change
Use for expensive computations that depend on reactive state

pattern.name: text_content_binding
pattern.description: Binding signal values to DOM text content

pattern.name: attribute_binding
pattern.description: Binding signal values to DOM attributes

pattern.name: event_handling
pattern.description: Handling DOM events with reactive updates

pattern.name: functional_component
pattern.description: Creating functional components with reactive props

pattern.name: component_with_children
pattern.description: Components that accept and render children

pattern.name: context_provider
batched_updates
pattern.description: Batching multiple signal updates for efficiency

pattern.name: lazy_computation
resource_cleanup
pattern.description: Proper cleanup of resources and subscriptions

pattern.name: signal_testing
